case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. LEONEL PEREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY YOLANDA ARENAS--CCSF/SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $565.29 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LEONEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, LEONEL $1,136.50 PRINCIPAL, $565.29 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,701.79

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.50 SERVED NOV-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LEONEL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LEONEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,091.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LEONEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LEONEL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
